title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Swiggy Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Software Engineer at Swiggy Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Faridabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!
